untranslatable_reason: Signal requires VIX regime detection with deviation thresholds, regime persistence confirmation over N days, and dynamic mean-reversion targets. The allowed indicators lack: (1) explicit VIX regime classification logic, (2) deviation percentile calculations within regime ranges, (3) persistence confirmation over rolling periods. Parameters THRESHOLD_NEEDED and regime_confirmation_period_days are undefined and cannot be quantified from source text. india_vix is available but insufficient for full regime-switching logic required.
translation_notes: Partial translation using india_vix for HIGH (20-40) and QUIET (10-20) regime detection. Entry conditions simplified to regime boundaries. Exit conditions approximate reversion to midpoints (30 for HIGH, 15 for QUIET). Missing: dynamic deviation thresholds, persistence validation, and regime-switching triggers that require custom logic beyond standard indicators.
